sentences.target: Ich habe heute nur Ärger mit dem Drucker.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈhɔʏtə nuːɐ̯ ˈɛʁgɐ mɪt deːm ˈdrʊkɐ/

translations.de: Ich habe heute nur Ärger mit dem Drucker.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈhɔʏtə nuːɐ̯ ˈɛʁgɐ mɪt deːm ˈdrʊkɐ/
translations.en: I’m having nothing but trouble with the printer today.
translations.es: Hoy la impresora solo me da problemas.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je n'ai que des ennuis avec l'imprimante.
translations.it: Oggi la stampante mi dà solo problemi.
translations.yue: 今日部打印機淨係出問題。
translations.pt: Hoje a impressora só dá problemas.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cái máy in chỉ toàn trục trặc.
translations.ar: اليوم الطابعة لا تجلب إلا المتاعب.
translations.nl: Vandaag heb ik alleen maar gedoe met de printer.
translations.hu: Ma csak bajom van a nyomtatóval.
translations.hi: आज प्रिंटर सिर्फ परेशान कर रहा है।
translations.pl: Dziś mam same problemy z drukarką.
translations.el: Σήμερα έχω μόνο μπελάδες με τον εκτυπωτή.
translations.nb: I dag har jeg bare trøbbel med skriveren.
translations.id: Hari ini printer cuma bikin masalah.
translations.sv: I dag är det bara strul med skrivaren.
translations.ro: Astăzi am numai probleme cu imprimanta.
translations.cs: Dnes mám s tiskárnou samé potíže.
translations.da: I dag er der kun bøvl med printeren.
translations.fi: Tänään tulostimen kanssa on pelkkää harmia.
translations.ja: 今日はプリンターがトラブルばかりだ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st sg, present) expressing possession/experience.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Focus/limiting adverb; restricts scope to the following NP ('Ärger').
Common noun; accusative singular as direct object of 'habe'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a PP specifying what the trouble is with.
Definite article; dative masculine singular agreeing with 'Drucker'.
Common noun; dative singular, object of 'mit'.

sentences.target: Der Chef macht Ärger wegen der Verspätung.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ʃɛf maxt ˈɛʁgɐ ˈveːgən deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʃpɛːtʊŋ/

translations.de: Der Chef macht Ärger wegen der Verspätung.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ʃɛf maxt ˈɛʁgɐ ˈveːgən deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈʃpɛːtʊŋ/
translations.en: The boss is making trouble about the delay.
translations.es: El jefe está armando lío por el retraso.
translations.fr: Le patron fait des histoires à cause du retard.
translations.it: Il capo fa storie per il ritardo.
translations.ko: 상사가 지각 때문에 뭐라고 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 老板在为迟到这事发火。
translations.yue: 老細為咗遲到呢件事喺度鬧人。
translations.pt: O chefe está criando caso por causa do atraso.
translations.vi: Sếp đang làm ầm lên vì đến muộn.
translations.nl: De baas doet moeilijk over de vertraging.
translations.hu: A főnök balhézik a késés miatt.
translations.hi: बॉस देर होने पर डाँट रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Szef robi aferę z powodu spóźnienia.
translations.el: Το αφεντικό κάνει φασαρία για την καθυστέρηση.
translations.nb: Sjefen lager bråk på grunn av forsinkelsen.
translations.ro: Șeful face scandal din cauza întârzierii.
translations.ja: 上司が遅刻のことで文句を言っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular, determiner of 'Chef'.
Common noun; nominative singular, head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb (3rd sg, present) meaning 'makes/causes' in context.
Common noun; accusative singular as direct object of 'macht'.
Preposition governing genitive; introduces a causal PP.
Definite article; genitive feminine singular, determiner of 'Verspätung'.
Common noun; genitive singular, object of 'wegen'.

sentences.target: Wir wollen keinen Ärger mit den Nachbarn.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən ˈkaɪ̯nən ˈɛʁgɐ mɪt deːn ˈnaxbaʁn/

translations.de: Wir wollen keinen Ärger mit den Nachbarn.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən ˈkaɪ̯nən ˈɛʁgɐ mɪt deːn ˈnaxbaʁn/
translations.en: We don’t want any trouble with the neighbors.
translations.es: No queremos tener problemas con los vecinos.
translations.fr: On ne veut pas d'ennuis avec les voisins.
translations.it: Non vogliamo avere problemi con i vicini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不想和邻居起冲突。
translations.yue: 我哋唔想同鄰居起衝突。
translations.ru: Мы не хотим проблем с соседями.
translations.pt: Não queremos confusão com os vizinhos.
translations.he: אנחנו לא רוצים בעיות עם השכנים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không muốn rắc rối với hàng xóm.
translations.nl: We willen geen gedoe met de buren.
translations.uk: Ми не хочемо мати проблем із сусідами.
translations.hi: हम पड़ोसियों से कोई झंझट नहीं चाहते。
translations.el: Δεν θέλουμε μπελάδες με τους γείτονες.
translations.nb: Vi vil ikke ha trøbbel med naboene.
translations.id: Kami tidak mau punya masalah dengan tetangga.
translations.sv: Vi vill inte ha bråk med grannarna.
translations.da: Vi vil ikke have ballade med naboerne.
translations.ja: 近所の人とトラブルは起こしたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st pl, present) expressing desire; no accompanying infinitive.
Negative determiner; accusative masculine singular modifying 'Ärger'.
Common noun; accusative singular as (negated) direct object of 'wollen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces PP specifying with whom.
Definite article; dative plural, determiner of 'Nachbarn'.
Common noun; dative plural, object of 'mit'.

sentences.target: Das mit dem Parkplatz gibt nur Ärger.
sentences.reading: /das mɪt deːm ˈpaʁkplats gɪpt nuːɐ̯ ˈɛʁgɐ/

translations.de: Das mit dem Parkplatz gibt nur Ärger.
translations.ipa: /das mɪt deːm ˈpaʁkplats gɪpt nuːɐ̯ ˈɛʁgɐ/
translations.en: That parking issue just causes trouble.
translations.es: Lo del aparcamiento solo trae problemas.
translations.fr: Cette histoire de stationnement n'apporte que des ennuis.
translations.it: Questa storia del parcheggio porta solo problemi.
translations.ko: 그 주차 문제는 괜히 다툼만 불러와요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个停车的事只会惹麻烦。
translations.yue: 個泊車嗰件事只會惹麻煩。
translations.pt: Essa questão do estacionamento só dá problemas.
translations.he: העניין הזה עם החניה רק עושה צרות.
translations.tr: Şu park yeri meselesi sadece sorun çıkarıyor.
translations.vi: Chuyện chỗ đậu xe này chỉ gây rắc rối thôi.
translations.ar: موضوع موقف السيارات هذا لا يجلب إلا المتاعب.
translations.nl: Dat gedoe met de parkeerplek levert alleen maar problemen op.
translations.hu: Ez a parkolóügy csak bajt hoz.
translations.hi: यह पार्किंग वाला मामला बस झंझट ही खड़ा करता है。
translations.pl: Ta sprawa z parkingiem to tylko kłopoty.
translations.el: Αυτό με το πάρκινγκ φέρνει μόνο μπελάδες.
translations.nb: Det med parkeringen fører bare til trøbbel.
translations.id: Urusan parkir itu cuma bikin masalah.
translations.sv: Det där med parkeringen leder bara till strul.
translations.ro: Chestia cu parcarea nu aduce decât probleme.
translations.cs: To s parkováním přináší jen potíže.
translations.da: Det der med parkeringen giver bare bøvl.
translations.ja: その駐車場の件はトラブルしか招かない。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun; head of the subject NP ('the thing about ...'), nominative singular.
Preposition governing dative; begins a PP postmodifying 'Das'.
Definite article; dative masculine singular with 'Parkplatz'.
Common noun; dative singular, object of 'mit'.
Finite main verb (3rd sg, present); predicates result/creation, taking 'Ärger' as object.
Limiting adverb; narrows the scope to the amount/type of 'Ärger'.
Common noun; accusative singular as direct object of 'gibt'.

es: Hoy la impresora solo me da problemas.
El jefe está armando lío por el retraso.
No queremos tener problemas con los vecinos.
Lo del aparcamiento solo trae problemas.

Le patron fait des histoires à cause du retard.
On ne veut pas d'ennuis avec les voisins.
Cette histoire de stationnement n'apporte que des ennuis.

Il capo fa storie per il ritardo.
Non vogliamo avere problemi con i vicini.
